title: tina giant hand approaching
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target and primary identity, car, and composition authority. Image 2 supports Tina face and the pink lychee gummy. Image 3 is concept context for a car that may peel, but do not borrow its orange gummy seats, parachute, floating panels, camera, or composition. Preserve Tina, her wardrobe, product, rideshare interior, and passenger-window view from Image 1. Outside, beyond the houses, a truly landscape-sized human hand descends from the sky and delicately pinches a newly raised gummy seam along the car roof, just before peeling. Clouds pass behind the wrist. Tina looks upward with delighted anticipation, not fear. Monumental but playful, documentary suburb, one clean action setup, no torn metal, no body horror, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
